title: Skill in Questions
subtitle: How the Buddha Taught
pageTitle: Skill in Questions: How the Buddha Taught
author: Thanissaro Bhikkhu
summary: This book offers an in-depth exploration of the role of questions in the Buddha's teaching, organized around the four classes of questions that the Buddha addressed: questions that call for a direct, categorical answer; those that must be reframed; those that call for cross-questioning; and those that should be put aside altogether. This book serves as a valuable guide to understanding the crucial part that spiritual questioning plays in the practice of Dhamma.
